description_long: This is a sealed, crinkled red plastic bag of Doritos, a popular snack food. The front of the bag prominently displays the Doritos logo in bold white letters with a black outline, set against a dynamic starburst graphic. Below the logo, there is an image of triangular, orange-colored chips, suggesting the contents inside. The flavor 'Chilli Heatwave' is clearly indicated in white text, and the bag also shows a weight marking of 180g. Nutritional information is visible in a small panel on the lower left corner of the front. The bag's surface is glossy and slightly reflective, with visible creases and folds typical of flexible snack packaging.
description: A glossy red Doritos bag featuring the logo, flavor text, and images of triangular chips, with visible nutritional labeling and a crinkled plastic surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Doritos logo, starburst graphic, and partial chip images, with the bag's crinkled texture most visible.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the bag's thickness and curvature, with the Doritos logo and starburst graphic partially visible.
description_view_2: The opposite end view displays the full image of the chips, the 'Chilli Heatwave' flavor text, and the 180g weight marking.
description_view_3: This side view shows the bag's side seam and curvature, with the flavor text and chip images partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Doritos brand logo is visible on the front and top of the bag, featuring bold white letters with a black outline and a yellow-orange starburst background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The flavor 'Chilli Heatwave' is indicated in white text on the front, with images of orange triangular chips and a fiery starburst graphic.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A small nutritional information panel is visible on the lower left corner of the front of the bag.
